title: Debugging and logging
excerpt: description: Access logs for Pages Functions using the Cloudflare dashboard or Wrangler CLI. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Access your Functions logs by using the Cloudflare dashboard or the [Wrangler CLI](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/wrangler/commands/pages/#pages-deployment-tail). Logs are a powerful debugging tool that can help you test and monitor the behavior of your Pages Functions once they have been deployed. Logs are available for every deployment of your Pages project.
